title: Cosmo's Comfy Cherry GUI Overhaul
description: I wanted a pink GUI, so I made one using the cherry wood and quartz textures!
body:
## <center> **I wanted a pink GUI!**

<center>so I made one, and here it is so others can use it too!

 

Using the cherry wood textures and some quartz in there too for furnaces and tables like them, I redid all the Minecraft UI. Here are some screenshots:


![The Minecraft pause menu, but the background texture for all of the buttons are replaced with tiled cherry wood.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0d633dcb265b9b265e3a4a43145aa8b2a29b354.png)
![A screenshot of the Minecraft furnace GUI, which has been replaced with tiled quartz textures.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0035ee846a257b453f30b136b496117fb226eb47.png)
![The Minecraft sound options menu, but the background for all the buttons has been replaced with tiled cherry wood textures. The background for the sliders are cherry log textures.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82d03deef8ce7834f87438f133d58cd8952251f1.png)


## **MORE SCREENSHOTS IN THE GALLERY <33**
I plan to add mod support for every mod I encounter while playing with it. This pack on the latest version (CCG1.3.1) supports the following mods:

-Apotheosis **(only on 1.20 versions)**

-AppleSkin

-Client Sort

-Combat Roll (cannot override the arrow color, change this in client config if you want)

-Corpse

-Cosmetic Armor Reworked

-Crafting Tweaks

-Curios

-EMI

-Farmer's Delight

-Goblin Traders

-Quark

-Sophisticatedcore (Backpacks, etc)

-Supplementaries

-Tom's Simple Storage

-TrashSlot

-Simple Voice Chat

 

## **INTEGRATIONS CURRENTLY IN PROGRESS**

-JEI

-Blue Skies

-Create

-Apotheosis (1.21+)<center>
